dagriculture 0.3.0

Build the internal adjacency index for a graph

Source: R/graph_index.R
dagri_adjacency.Rd

Performs a single O(V+E) pass over graph$edges and returns four named lists keyed by every node id in names(graph$nodes) (each initialized to character(0) so no NULL-guarding is needed):

Usage

dagri_adjacency(graph)

Arguments

graph

A dagri_graph.

Value

A named list with components forward, reverse, forward_edges, and reverse_edges, each a named list keyed by node id.

Details

  • forward: node -> unique vector of downstream neighbor ids (edge$from -> edge$to)

  • reverse: node -> unique vector of upstream neighbor ids (edge$to -> edge$from)

  • forward_edges: node -> vector of outgoing edge ids (not uniqued; each edge is distinct)

  • reverse_edges: node -> vector of incoming edge ids (not uniqued)

The index is derived per call and is never stored on the graph, so the pure-value, immutable public API is unchanged. Internals that previously re-scanned the full edge list per neighbor lookup instead index into these pre-built maps.

On this page

Developed by Maximilian Scholz.
